home.title: Edit, separate and optimize your designs in the browser
home.subtitle: Upload an image or SVG, split it into editable layers, add text and export to PSD or SVG. No installs, no watermarks.
home.toolsSubtitle: Each tool works on its own, no signup. Try it and download the result.
home.convertersSubtitle: Convert between image formats in seconds. Free and no signup.

image-to-layers.title: Separate image into color layers online
image-to-layers.description: Turn a flat image (PNG or JPG) into editable color layers. Free and no signup.
image-to-layers.intro: Upload an image and we automatically separate it into color layers, ready to edit or export.

png-to-psd.title: Convert PNG to PSD with layers online
png-to-psd.description: Upload a PNG and download it as a Photoshop PSD file with layers. Free, no watermark.
png-to-psd.intro: Convert your PNG into an editable PSD keeping the layers. Nothing to install.

remove-background.title: Remove image background online
remove-background.description: Remove the background from any image automatically with AI. Get a clean transparent PNG in seconds. Free, no signup, no watermark.
remove-background.intro: Upload an image and let AI remove the background instantly. Perfect for product photos, portraits and logos.

heic-to-jpg.title: Convert HEIC to JPG online
heic-to-jpg.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG in seconds. Free, no signup, works in your browser.
heic-to-jpg.intro: Upload a HEIC file from your iPhone and download it as a standard JPG. Perfect for sharing or uploading anywhere.

landing.dropHint: Drag your file here or click
landing.editInEditor: Edit these layers in the editor ->
landing.noSignup: The whole process happens instantly and with no account needed. Upload your file, process and download the result.

editor.emptyTitle: Drag an SVG or an image here.
editor.emptyHint: The SVG is split into layers; PNG/JPG come in as a layer you can split by color. You can also add text.
editor.selectLayer: Select a layer to see its properties.
editor.name: Name

optimizer.title: Design Compressor + Optimizer
optimizer.intro: Upload images or SVG and get optimized versions for web, social or print.
optimizer.dropHint: Drag images here or click to choose
optimizer.dropFormats: PNG, JPG, WebP and SVG. You can upload several at once.
